programmes.show_description: Snap up the best offers at QVC before they're gone! We've got great savings on fashion, beauty, home and more, including items that won't be around for long.
Find your new favourite bag in this showcase of must-have handbags, from gorgeous totes to clever cross-bodies. Discover yours today!

First established over 150 years ago, join reputable gardening brand de Jager as they share high quality plants and bulbs in all shapes and sizes, to help you create your dream outdoor space.
